title: diplotaxis humilis subsp. repanda
intro: Diplotaxis humilis subsp. repanda, also known as wild rocket or sea rocket, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Diplotaxis humilis subsp. repanda include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Diplotaxis humilis subsp. repanda can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a culinary herb in salads and other dishes.
